{
  "verdict": "PASS",
  "artifact_sha256": "5e46ba3aec8b000018feb48c1d5cd50e07cdfd61c46edd5caa469da47c8b6a64",
  "summary": "Pre-execution plan meets the goal: deterministic vectors for nonzero structural reject vs echoed literal ignore, explicit preserved malformed-boundary minority risk, and no workspace/execution claims beyond the supplied V0 evidence. Host-pending execution is correctly labeled; no blocking plan defects.",
  "criteria_reviewed": [
    "Artifact is a deterministic verification plan (not a false claim of completed execution)",
    "Coverage: reject actual nonzero structural exit markers",
    "Coverage: ignore literal text exit 1 inside echoed shell commands",
    "Preserve minority risk about malformed transcript boundaries as visible residual",
    "No claims of workspace access or execution beyond supplied mechanical evidence",
    "Dependency-free constraint reflected for harness/plugin scope",
    "Locked testable parser rules and fixed expected outcomes",
    "Host execution procedure, aggregate gate, and failure handling actionability",
    "Idempotence / fixed vector order determinism",
    "Honesty about limits of supplied V0-only mechanical evidence"
  ],
  "blind_spots": [],
  "blocking_findings": [],
  "non_blocking_findings": [
    "V4b–V4e and several V7 cases are pattern/description-level rather than fully embedded exact multi-line byte fixtures; host must expand them before run to keep harness purely mechanical.",
    "Some negative cases allow Reject or Malformed as dual success; coarse enum is stated, but dual acceptance slightly weakens single-oracle strictness.",
    "Plugin dependency-freedom is treated as out-of-band/optional inventory (R10) because no manifest/source was supplied; harness dependency-freedom is gated, plugin static proof is not."
  ],
  "evidence": [
    "Goal requests a plan only; candidate is explicitly a pre-execution plan with all vector statuses pending host execution.",
    "Supplied mechanical evidence quoted and scoped solely as V0 happy-path [exit 0] accept; plan states it does not prove nonzero reject, echo-ignore, deps, or boundaries.",
    "Nonzero reject vectors: V1a–c ([exit 1]/[exit 2]/[exit 255]), V5b, V6b with Expected Reject.",
    "Echo/literal ignore vectors: V2a–d (echo/printf/false; echo exit 1 bodies with [exit 0] Accept and paired nonzero Reject).",
    "Precedence/payload fakes: V3a–c structural trailer wins over body [exit N] text.",
    "Minority risk section retained with policy (no invent nonzero from garbage; no silent repair) plus dedicated V7a–e and release-note residual requirement.",
    "Explicit non-claims: no seat-side cd/reads/runs; no production proof until V1–V3; execution authority = active host only.",
    "Determinism controls: fixed order V0…V8, exact expected outcomes, re-parse idempotence, abort-on-first-mismatch procedure.",
    "Failure handling maps V1-only/V2-only/V3a/R8 failures to release blocks."
  ],
  "required_actions": []
}
